summary: Frontend testing completed for Training Panel hyperparameter presets feature. All 9 features verified working correctly. Three preset buttons (Prototype, Development, Fine-tune) with Lucide icons (Beaker, Code, Target) are displayed. Clicking each preset correctly sets the research-backed values. Smart Tips show architecture-specific recommendations for CNN, Transformer, and LSTM models with specific LR ranges.
passed_tests: Test 1: Training Panel shows 3 preset buttons (Prototype, Development, Fine-tune) - PASSED
Test 2: Presets use Lucide icons (Beaker for Prototype, Code for Development, Target for Fine-tune) - PASSED (verified via SVG class names: lucide-beaker, lucide-code, lucide-target)
Test 3: Clicking Prototype preset sets: 5 epochs, batch 64, LR 0.003 - PASSED
Test 4: Clicking Development preset sets: 50 epochs, batch 32, LR 0.001 - PASSED
Test 5: Clicking Fine-tune preset sets: 100 epochs, batch 16, LR 0.0001 - PASSED
Test 6: Smart Tips section shows architecture-aware recommendations - PASSED
Test 7: CNN template shows 'CNN Detected' tip with LR 1e-4 to 3e-3 recommendation - PASSED
Test 8: Transformer template shows 'Transformer Detected' tip with LR 1e-5 to 5e-4 + warmup recommendation - PASSED
Test 9: LSTM template shows 'RNN/LSTM Detected' tip with gradient clipping recommendation - PASSED
Test 10: Advanced Settings accordion works correctly - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: TRAINING_PRESETS correctly defines research-backed values from 2024 best practices
getSmartTips function provides architecture-specific recommendations with specific LR ranges
Lucide icons (Beaker, Code, Target) are properly imported and used instead of emojis
Preset descriptions include helpful tips like 'Use for testing architecture' and 'Recommended for most cases'
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Training Panel preset features verified working. Preset buttons (Prototype/Development/Fine-tune) with Lucide icons correctly set hyperparameters. Smart Tips show architecture-specific recommendations for CNN (LR 1e-4 to 3e-3), Transformer (LR 1e-5 to 5e-4 with warmup), and LSTM (gradient clipping). Advanced Settings accordion works. WebGL unavailable in headless browser but doesn't affect UI testing.
